items.example: I usually start work at nine in the morning.

items.phrase: I often have meetings in the afternoon
items.translation: У меня часто бывают встречи днём
items.example: I often have meetings in the afternoon, so mornings are quieter.
I hardly ever check my emails at the weekend.
I never work late because I like to spend time with my family.
How often do you travel for business?

items.phrase: Once a week / Twice a month
items.translation: Раз в неделю / Два раза в месяц
items.example: I visit clients once a week.
